message:
fix(services): add null safety checks to cost forecasting and metrics

Addresses TypeScript strict null checking by adding explicit undefined
checks and early returns for array access operations that could fail
on empty data.

cost-forecast.service.ts:
- Add undefined checks for array element access in detectSeasonality()
- Add early return when historicalData[0] is undefined in forecastLinear()
- Add undefined checks for smoothed array values in forecastExponential()
- Add bounds checking in forecast validation loop
- Use nullish coalescing for potentially undefined smoothed values

checkpoint.ts & cost-tracker.service.ts:
- Similar undefined guard additions for array operations

metrics.ts:
- Add safety checks for metric value access

These changes prevent potential runtime errors when processing empty
or sparse time series data during cost forecasting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
